ogTitle: Congarinni North vs Congewai: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Congarinni North and Congewai.
heading: Congarinni North vs Congewai — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Congarinni North, New South Wales and Congewai, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Congarinni North has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Congewai (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Congarinni North or Congewai safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Congarinni North has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Congewai scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Congarinni North scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Congewai scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Congarinni North or Congewai?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Congarinni North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
